code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut best_val = 0
mut best_abs = 0
mut have = false
mut cur = ""
mut in_tok = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if in_tok
      let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      let a = if v < 0
        -v
      else
        v
      end
      if not have or a < best_abs
        best_val = v
        best_abs = a
        have = true
      end
      cur = ""
      in_tok = false
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    in_tok = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_tok
  let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let a = if v < 0
    -v
  else
    v
  end
  if not have or a < best_abs
    best_val = v
    best_abs = a
    have = true
  end
end

print("min_abs=#{best_val}")
